title: pv-addon-replaymod
description: A fork of Replay Voice Chat that works with Plasmo Voice allowing you to record voice chat with ReplayMod.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/3UYoKZg.png)
Plasmo Voice | Modrinth | GitHub | Discord | Patreon
# pv-addon-replaymod A fork of [Replay Voice Chat](https://github.com/henkelmax/replay-voice-chat) that works with [Plasmo Voice](https://github.com/plasmoapp/plasmo-voice) allowing you to record voice chat with [ReplayMod](https://www.replaymod.com/). ## Installation 1. Install [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) and [ReplayMod](https://www.replaymod.com/) 1. Download the add-on from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/pv-addon-replaymod/) 1. Drop it into the `~/mods` folder ## Credits - [Replay Voice Chat](https://github.com/henkelmax/replay-voice-chat) - [Sonic](https://github.com/waywardgeek/sonic) - [ReplayMod](https://github.com/ReplayMod/ReplayMod)
